## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Formula/multiplier change
- [ ] New tracker mapping
- [ ] New task type
- [ ] Eval addition/update
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other

## Eval Results

For formula or workflow changes, include before/after results from:

- [ ] `eval-quick.md` — Quick path smoke test
- [ ] `eval-hybrid.md` — Detailed path, multi-team
- [ ] `eval-batch.md` — Batch with dependencies
- [ ] `eval-regression.md` — 6 baseline cases

## Supporting Data

For formula changes: link to research, calibration data, or empirical evidence.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run the relevant evals
- [ ] No regressions detected
- [ ] Wiki pages updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Description is clear and concise
